case_title: PACIFIC BAY INVESTMENTS,INC.DBA DAKOTA HOTEL VS ZWABINSKY,OREST

docket_entries.description: LETTER RECEIVED FROM PACIFIC BAY REGARDING DEFAULT OF PAYMENT (SENT TO HOFF FOR CLARIFICATION OF JUDG AMOUNT).
